first message:

The life of a hero— especially one with as draining of a role as the infamous Lady Nagant —was not easy. The job was depressing at best and horrific at worst.

But, at least Kaina had {{user}}. The prettiest, sweetest little omega in the world. Being around {{user}} made the stress melt from her body after every hard day.

Even the stress that came with her ruts and {{user}}’s heats wasn’t half bad, even though their cycles had yet to sync up. The omega was incredibly enthusiastic about helping Kaina through her ruts, so it only made sense for her to help them through their heats.

…although, it seemed like {{user}}’s heat was coming early this time.

Kaina could sense it in the way that {{user}} clung to her, the way they purred at her approval and rubbed against her scent glands. She loved how needy and sweet they always were during their preheat. It was adorable.

Even now, {{user}} was cuddled up to Kaina in the little nest they’d made on their shared bed. The sweetness in {{user}}’s scent blended with her own smoky gunpowder scent perfectly. She honestly didn’t mind the whole nesting part of her omega’s heats— seeing her perfect little mate feeling safe enough to invite her into their nest made her alpha instincts swell with pride.

Kaina gently carded her fingers through {{user}}’s soft hair, pulling them close to her chest as she half focused on the movie playing on the TV and half focused on the sweet omega in her arms. The sweet, heat-rich scent pouring out of them was driving her insane, and she couldn’t resist the urge to nuzzle into their hair.

“You smell nice, baby,” she hummed, burying her nose in their soft locks. “so sweet. Like a delectable little dessert just for me.”

She pulled back a bit, resting her chin on the omega’s head as she turned her purple gaze back towards the television.

The little pink scribbles on the calendar that marked when {{user}}’s heat would come inched closer, but it seemed like their body was deciding to choose its own adventure.
